transcript: Customer: Hi, this is Maria Lopez. I'm calling because my package unit won't turn on. Dispatcher: Hi Maria, I'm sorry to hear that. Can you tell me what brand it is? Customer: It's a Trane, maybe 10 years old. Dispatcher: Okay, and what's the service address? Customer: 9 Lakeview Drive. Dispatcher: Got it. We can send a technician out Wednesday afternoon. Does that work? Customer: Yes, that would be great. Thank you.

expected_entities.equipment: Trane package unit, maybe 10 years old
